summary: Bug fix verification complete. Both bugs have been successfully fixed: (1) Speed limit sign is no longer stuck to user location marker - it's now a fixed UI overlay in top-left corner that only appears during active navigation with speed limit data, (2) Compass mode toggle and North Up/Heading Up orientation toggle are both working correctly with proper visual state changes.

minor_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing images: 'road_', 'construction_pattern', ' ' - these are sprite images not loaded
Chart dimension warning 'width(-1) height(-1)' still occurs occasionally
minor_issues.note: Known issue from previous iterations - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: SpeedLimitMarker component in NavigationView.tsx is now a fixed div overlay with 'absolute top-4 left-4 z-[1500]' positioning
VERIFIED: SpeedLimitMarker only renders when currentSpeedLimit is set (returns null otherwise)
VERIFIED: No old-style speed-limit-marker class found on the Leaflet map
VERIFIED: Compass mode button (data-testid='compass-mode-btn') toggles correctly between inactive (bg-white/5 text-zinc-400) and active (bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400) states
VERIFIED: Orientation button (data-testid='orientation-btn') toggles correctly between North Up (bg-white/5) and Heading Up (bg-[#D4AF37]) modes
VERIFIED: handleToggleNorthUp function properly resets rotation when switching to north-up and applies heading rotation when switching to heading-up
VERIFIED: Map controls sidebar shows all expected buttons: filter, zoom (+/-), map overview, 2D toggle, target/follow, orientation, compass
VERIFIED: Settings Units toggle (MPH/KMH) works correctly with visual feedback
VERIFIED: Backend /api/ip-location returns valid JSON with lat/lon coordinates

speed_limit_not_on_user_marker.details: Speed limit overlay count: 0 (expected - only shows during active navigation with speed limit data), Old speed limit marker count: 0 (no old-style marker stuck to user location)

compass_mode_toggle.details: Button toggles from inactive (bg-white/5 text-zinc-400) to active (bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400) state correctly

orientation_toggle.details: Button toggles from Heading Up (bg-[#D4AF37]) to North Up (bg-white/5) state correctly

features_tested.guest_login: PASS - Click 'Continue as Guest', reaches dashboard

features_tested.user_marker_visible: PASS - User marker count: 2 (wrapper and pointer elements)
features_tested.map_controls_visible: PASS - All buttons present in right sidebar
features_tested.compass_rose_visible: PASS - Compass rose visible in bottom-left corner
features_tested.weather_widget: PASS - Weather data displayed (59°F, Clear, 4 MPH SE wind)
features_tested.settings_units_toggle: PASS - MPH/KMH toggle works with visual feedback
features_tested.backend_ip_location: PASS - Returns valid JSON with coordinates

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://nav-emblem-display.preview.emergentagent.com. Bug fixes verified: (1) SpeedLimitMarker is now a fixed UI overlay in top-left corner (absolute top-4 left-4 z-[1500]) that only shows during active navigation with speed limit data - no longer stuck to user marker, (2) Compass mode toggle (data-testid='compass-mode-btn') and orientation toggle (data-testid='orientation-btn') both work correctly with proper visual state changes. Note: On desktop without GPS heading, heading-up mode won't visually rotate the map since there's no heading data, but the toggle saves preference to localStorage.
